items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🆕🆕YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller❗❗It has to be said that the (Saint Laurent) chain bag is on fire in the fashion world. This old French luxury brand possesses a unique magic, and the LOOK is full of highlights! Imported original calf leather, Italy-customized engraved logo hardware, every inch of detail is authentic using ZP standards! A favorite of celebrities, not only is the appearance high, but it is also a powerhouse![Smile][Smile][Smile]Size: 20×17×6cm, Model 1855

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
In-stock photo
This year's exploding shoulder bag is finally here from YSL! When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. The inspiration comes from the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", telling the story of the 5-7 PM between work and home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking stiff but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's iconic logo and the new insert buckle design, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model: 2024 Plain

『YSL Saint Laurent』
#Envelope#
#White Gold Buckle#
Small Grain Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag
Classic is eternal. The stunning V-pattern combined with the quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP original cowhide paired with a striking YSL logo, combining atmosphere and fashion!
Model: 526286
Size: 21x13x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
The hot-to-trot shoulder bag YSL finally has!!️ When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. Inspired by the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", it tells the story of the 5-7 PM gap between leaving work and getting home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives off a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 657228
Size: 24.5x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#Monogram Woc#
Latest Version_#Red Gold Buckle#
Monogram caviar leather envelope bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% original cowhide paired with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo adds a personal touch; flip-top design ensures security. Small bag with large capacity, featuring 10 card slots, two bill compartments, two central pockets, and one zippered interior pocket. Fits everything!
Model: 26801
Size: 22.5x14x4cm
